[LMB] - 为选定的物体或面指定材质。
[SHIFT+LMB] - 替换材质。
[CTRL+LMB] - 按材质选择物体（在场景中或通过选择）。
[ALT+LMB] - 按材质选择面（在场景中或通过选择）。
[SHIFT+ALT+LMB] - 添加到当前材质选择。
Blend Mode:
[LMB] - Assign material to selected object/objects or faces. 
[SHIFT+LMB] - Replace Material. 
[CTRL+LMB] - Select Objects by Material (in scene or by selected).
[ALT+LMB] - Select Faces by Material (in scene или by selected).
[SHIFT+ALT+LMB] - Add to current material selection.
